name: Data Vault: Hub, Link, Satellite
description: Build a Data Vault model with Hub, Link, and Satellite tables from two source systems

checks.name: Hub has 5 entries
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM h_customer;
checks.description: One hub entry per unique business key (5 source IDs across CRM and ECOM)

checks.name: Link has 5 entries
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM l_customer_source;
checks.description: One link entry per source customer mapping

checks.name: Satellite has 5 entries
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM s_customer_details;
checks.description: One satellite entry per source customer's attributes

checks.name: All hub hash keys are 32-char MD5 strings
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM h_customer WHERE customer_hash_key IS NOT NULL AND length(customer_hash_key) = 32;
checks.description: customer_hash_key must be MD5(business_key) — a 32-char hex string
